calendar.matters:
Request To Make Payments On Small Claims Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Taghi Astanehe, Esq. for and with Plaintiff/Respondent/Cross-Appellant Sunny Araya; Mekonnen Zere, Defendant/Appellant/Cross-respondent.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Taghi Astanehe and Sunny Araya testify on behalf of Plaintiff/Respondent/Cross-Appellant Sunny Araya.
Plaintiff presented a packet of documents marked for identification as Group A.

Mekonnen Zere, Defendant/Appellant/Cross-respondent, testifies on his own behalf.
Defendant presented a packet of documents marked for identification as Respondent's Group B.

At the conclusion of the testimony, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert J. Stumpf. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. (Not reported)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-12-2017 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-12-2017 Judgment Entered
